steps.title: Identify the goal and unifying element
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a SIMILARITY between the two inventors. From the notes, both improved on existing designs — this is the thread connecting them.

steps.title: Find the choice that achieves the goal
steps.content: Choice A directly compares both Beard's and Jones's inventions, highlighting the characteristic they share. Choices B and D discuss only one inventor each, while C uses “whereas” to emphasize differences. That matches choice A — A is correct.
